description: Cab ceiling or recessed light fixtures burned out, dim, or flickering, reducing visibility below safe levels
Emergency lighting unit missing, visibly damaged, or non-functional inside the cab
Cab wall panels showing scratches, dents, puncture holes, or delamination exposing substrate
visual_signals: deep scratch marks on wall panel

description: Cab ceiling panels damaged, sagging, stained, or showing signs of water intrusion from the hoistway
Cab handrail loose, detached from mounting brackets, or entirely missing from the cab wall
visual_signals: empty bolt holes where handrail should be

description: Cab flooring worn through, torn, curling at edges, or presenting a trip hazard at the threshold
visual_signals: curled floor edge at door opening

description: Cab mirror cracked, shattered, missing, or de-silvered to the point of being non-functional
Car operating panel damaged, buttons broken or missing, Braille markings illegible, or faceplate loose
Car door panel dented, scratched, corroded, or showing paint bubbling indicating hidden corrosion
visual_signals: dent in center of door panel
paint bubbling at bottom of door

description: Car or hoistway doors misaligned, with asymmetric gaps at center parting or along the door edges
visual_signals: uneven gap between closed door panels
one door panel higher than other
visible light through door edge gap

description: Debris, dirt, or foreign objects lodged in the door track or landing sill groove preventing smooth door operation
visual_signals: small objects caught in sill slot

description: Door safety edge or electronic reopening sensor visibly damaged, detached, or missing from the leading door edge
visual_signals: rubber safety edge torn or hanging
sensor strip detached from door edge
wiring exposed at door edge sensor

description: Doors not fully closing, leaving a visible gap, preventing the door interlock from engaging properly
visual_signals: door bouncing back before fully closing
light visible through door seam when closed

description: Landing door panel dented, corroded, bowed outward, or showing damage that compromises fire rating
visual_signals: rust on lower portion of landing door
landing door panel bowed or warped
visible gap in fire-rated door assembly

description: Floor position indicator at the landing not illuminated, displaying incorrectly, or completely non-functional
visual_signals: blank LED segment in floor number

description: Hall call button at the landing cracked, broken, missing its faceplate, or not illuminating when pressed
Excessive gap between the landing sill and the car sill exceeding ASME A17.1 clearance limits, creating an entrapment hazard
visual_signals: wide gap visible between car and landing floor
sill plate shifted out of alignment
shoe or small object could fall through gap
landing sill worn or chipped enlarging gap

description: Hallway lighting at the elevator landing inadequate, making it difficult to safely identify the car threshold
Standing water or evidence of flooding in the elevator pit indicating sump pump failure or water intrusion
visual_signals: water line marks on pit walls

description: Debris, trash, or contaminants accumulated in the elevator pit creating fire or vermin hazard
visual_signals: accumulated dust and dirt on pit equipment

description: Pit buffer springs or oil buffers showing visible damage, corrosion, leaking fluid, or misalignment
Pit lighting fixture missing, broken, or non-functional preventing safe pit inspection access
Machine room fire extinguisher missing from its designated location, discharged, or showing an expired inspection tag
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket on wall

description: Oil leaks or hydraulic fluid spills on the machine room floor around the power unit or piping connections
visual_signals: oil puddle beneath hydraulic power unit
fluid stain on machine room floor

description: Combustible materials, stored items, or debris present in the machine room violating dedicated-use requirements
visual_signals: cardboard boxes stored in machine room
cleaning supplies on machine room shelf

description: Frayed, spliced, or damaged electrical wiring visible in the machine room or controller cabinet
Machine room ventilation grilles blocked, fan not operating, or ambient temperature excessively high
visual_signals: items stacked in front of ventilation grille

description: Hoist ropes showing visible fraying, broken wires, flattening, or excessive wear beyond replacement criteria
visual_signals: broken wire strands protruding from rope

description: Guide rails showing corrosion, excessive wear on running surfaces, or missing rail clips and brackets
visual_signals: worn groove on rail running face

description: Weight capacity data plate missing, illegible, or not posted in a conspicuous location inside the cab
visual_signals: no capacity plate visible in cab

description: Inspection certificate missing from its required display location, expired, or illegible
Emergency alarm button or intercom not visible, damaged, or missing its identifying signage on the car operating panel
Emergency phone or two-way communication device non-functional, handset missing, or instructions not posted
